mapper.select:
select count(*) from company where 1=1
and (companyNm like concat('%', #{keyword},'%') or bizNo like concat('%', #{keyword},'%'))

select companyId, companyNm, bizNo FROM company WHERE 1=1
and (companyNm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR bizNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY companyNm ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: insert into company (companyNm, bizNo, tel, address, logoUrl) values (#{companyNm}, #{bizNo}, #{tel}, #{address}, #{logoUrl})
mapper.select: select count(*) from company where bizNo = #{bizNo} and isActive = 1
